# SentinelRx — Scan Audit Log

**Patient:** [patient name]
**Log started:** [date]

---

## How This Log Works

Entries are written automatically by SentinelRx after every scan. No copy-pasting required.

This log is your record of every OTC check performed — who was checked, what product, what decision was made, and what the patient profile looked like at the time. It can be shared with a physician or pharmacist if needed.

**Do not edit past entries.** New entries are always appended at the bottom.

---

━━━ SCAN LOG ENTRY ━━━
Date      : 2026-05-29 10:14
Patient   : Margaret Chen
Product   : Tylenol PM
Ingredients: Acetaminophen 500mg, Diphenhydramine HCl 25mg
Decision  : 🚫 DO NOT TAKE
Reason    : Diphenhydramine — Beers Criteria Class I for 65+. Fall risk, confusion, urinary retention.
Profile updated : 2026-05-29

Date      : 2026-06-13 00:00
Patient   : Margaret Chen
Product   : Advil Tablets
Ingredients: Ibuprofen 200 mg (NSAID)
Decision  : DO NOT TAKE
Reason    : NSAID contraindicated — warfarin (bleeding/INR), CKD Stage 2 (nephrotoxicity), CHF (fluid retention)
Profile updated : 2026-05-29
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━ SCAN LOG ENTRY ━━━
Date      : 2026-06-13 00:01
Patient   : Margaret Chen
Product   : Zinc Cold Therapy (up&up)
Ingredients: Zincum Gluconicum 1x (11mg Zinc)
Decision  : CALL PHARMACIST
Reason    : Label warns zinc inhibits Coumadin absorption; warfarin on profile; additional timing conflicts with levothyroxine and alendronate
Profile updated : 2026-05-29
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━ SCAN LOG ENTRY ━━━
Date      : 2026-06-13 00:02
Patient   : Margaret Chen
Product   : Children's Robitussin Cough & Chest Congestion DM
Ingredients: Dextromethorphan HBr 20mg, Guaifenesin 200mg (per 20ml)
Decision  : TAKE WITH CAUTION
Reason    : CHF — confirm cough is not fluid overload before giving; guaifenesin may elevate INR; use half adult dose (10ml)
Profile updated : 2026-05-29
